g.aria-label: X-axis for a linear scale with values from 1966 to 2024
Y-axis for a discrete scale with 6 values: Theatre / show control, Standardization, Tracker / demoscene, Music sequencer / adaptive, Engine / middleware, Audio games / accessibility

path.aria-label: year: 1972; lane: Theatre / show control; title: Richmond Sound Design founded (C. Richmond)
year: 1983; lane: Standardization; title: MIDI 1.0 — the shared ancestor
year: 1987; lane: Tracker / demoscene; title: Ultimate Soundtracker: 'playlist editor'
year: 1988; lane: Music sequencer / adaptive; title: Blue Ribbon SoundWorks (Bars&Pipes)
year: 1989; lane: Theatre / show control; title: 'MIDI Mania' panel (LDI); RSD MMA group
year: 1991; lane: Tracker / demoscene; title: ProTracker (Amiga)
year: 1991; lane: Standardization; title: MIDI Show Control v1.0
year: 1991; lane: Engine / middleware; title: Miles AIL — first game-audio middleware
year: 1991; lane: Music sequencer / adaptive; title: iMUSE in Monkey Island 2 (patent filed)
year: 1994; lane: Music sequencer / adaptive; title: iMUSE patent granted US 5,315,057
year: 1994; lane: Standardization; title: IASIG formed (MIDI Association)
year: 1994; lane: Theatre / show control; title: Huntington, Control Systems for Live Ent.
year: 1995; lane: Tracker / demoscene; title: FMOD debut (Firelight MODule player)
year: 1995; lane: Music sequencer / adaptive; title: MS buys Blue Ribbon SoundWorks
year: 1999; lane: Music sequencer / adaptive; title: Microsoft DirectMusic / DirectX Audio
year: 2000; lane: Engine / middleware; title: Audiokinetic founded, Montréal (Klein)
year: 2002; lane: Engine / middleware; title: Firelight Technologies incorporated
year: 2005; lane: Standardization; title: iXMF public-preview draft
year: 2006; lane: Engine / middleware; title: Wwise released; FMOD Designer
year: 2006; lane: Theatre / show control; title: QLab v1.0 (Figure 53)
year: 2010; lane: Audio games / accessibility; title: Papa Sangre (bespoke binaural engine)
year: 2011; lane: Audio games / accessibility; title: The Nightjar
year: 2012; lane: Engine / middleware; title: FMOD Studio announced (DAW-styled)
year: 2013; lane: Music sequencer / adaptive; title: Collins, Playing with Sound
year: 2019; lane: Engine / middleware; title: Sony acquires Audiokinetic
year: 2020; lane: Theatre / show control; title: Swift: FMOD adapted for theatre
year: 1996; lane: Engine / middleware; title: RAD Game Tools buys Miles (AIL)
